verdict_reason: The engineering layer preserves the kāma-kāmī technical Sanskrit term verbatim (named twice in the body and once in the falsifiability framing) and renders the reduplicative force ('desirer-of-desires, the operator whose state IS the pursuit-mechanism') faithfully. The structural metaphor — āpūryamāṇam acala-pratiṣṭham — is preserved at the structural level (full-and-unmoving) without flattening to 'be calm'. The doctrinal axis (Shankara: desires assume form-of-vision but produce no change; Ramanuja: engine of pursuit does not engage; Prabhupada: equilibrium-as-Kṛṣṇa-consciousness) is preserved at the source-pack level. The engineering analog stays at the operational layer (state-level under input) which is tradition-neutral and does not flatten any tradition. The falsifiability clause specifically closes the impassivity misread ('the ocean RECEIVES the rivers; it does not refuse them'), which is exactly Shankara's distinction between desires-assuming-form (receiving) and desires-producing-change (overflow). Pass.
